events.event_description: A U.S. liaison office was established in Angola, with Jeffrey Millington serving as Director.

evidence.quote: Jeffrey Millington, Director. Credentials presented: 1992-01. Left post on 1992-10.

events.event_description: The U.S. mission in Angola was elevated to Embassy status when Edmund T. DeJarnette was promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary and presented credentials.

evidence.quote: Edmund T Dejarnette, Director. Credentials presented: 1992-10. Promoted to Ambassador Extraordinary and Plenipotentiary on 1994-07-14.
